title: Wollastonia integrifolia
intro: Wollastonia integrifolia, also known as the integrifolia daisy or Wollastonia, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. Its bioactive constituents include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Wollastonia integrifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat respiratory conditions such as bronchitis and asthma.
